commands.title: /setblock
commands.description: Places one specific block at one location.
commands.breakdown: pos = x y z coordinates, block = block ID (e.g., stone).

commands.title: /fill
commands.description: Fills a specified region with a block.
commands.breakdown: from and to = opposite corners of the cuboid area. mode = replace, outline, hollow, toggle, or keep.

commands.title: /clone
commands.description: Copies a region of blocks to another place.
commands.breakdown: begin and end define the source box. destination is the bottom-north-west corner of where to paste.

commands.title: /structure
commands.description: Saves, loads, or deletes build as structure files.
commands.breakdown: name is the ID. Use 'save' with coordinates, 'load' to place it, 'delete' to remove from memory.

commands.title: /place
commands.description: Places jigsaw pieces or world features like trees.
commands.breakdown: feature is the ID (e.g., oak_tree). Jigsaws are for multi-part structures.

commands.title: /locate
commands.description: Finds coordinates for the nearest structure or biome.

commands.title: /spreadplayers
commands.description: Teleports entities to random locations within an area.

commands.title: /worldbuilder
commands.description: Toggles World Builder status (allows breaking blocks like barriers).

commands.title: /setworldspawn
commands.description: Sets the default spawn point for all players.

commands.title: Clear Area
commands.description: Quickly deletes blocks in a 10x10x10 area around you.

commands.title: Get Barrier
commands.description: Gives you the invisible barrier block.

commands.title: Get Struct Block
commands.description: Gives you a structure block for saving/loading areas.
